settings_intro: Manage Yggdrasil, account, mail, audit, and runtime behavior from one controlled surface.
settings_navigation_desc: Choose a domain to edit related options.
settings_empty_desc: Try another group or search term.
settings_save_hint: Review the changed values, then save them together.
settings_sensitive_keep_placeholder: Leave blank to keep the current value
settings_category_yggdrasil_desc: Launcher metadata, texture URLs, upload switches, and signing keys.
settings_category_auth_desc: Registration, browser sessions, login codes, and local account policy.
settings_category_external_auth_desc: OAuth2/OIDC availability and automatic account creation.
settings_category_site_desc: Public origins and brand text used by the embedded frontend.
settings_category_network_desc: CORS behavior for browser clients and integrations.
settings_category_mail_desc: SMTP delivery and transactional email templates.
settings_category_runtime_desc: Background task scheduling, retention, and cleanup loops.
settings_category_audit_desc: Security event recording and retention policy.
settings_subcategory_mail_config_desc: Connection and sender values used for account emails.
settings_subcategory_mail_template_desc: Subjects and HTML templates for account workflows.
settings_subcategory_runtime_mail_desc: Polling interval for the persistent mail outbox.
settings_item_public_site_url_desc: Externally reachable origins used when the frontend builds absolute site URLs.
settings_item_branding_title_desc: Name shown in the embedded frontend and browser surfaces.
settings_item_branding_description_desc: Short public description for the Minecraft identity service.
settings_item_branding_favicon_url_desc: Icon URL used by the embedded frontend.
settings_item_branding_wordmark_dark_url: Optional logo asset for dark surfaces.
settings_item_branding_wordmark_light_ur: Optional logo asset for light surfaces.
settings_item_auth_cookie_secure_desc: Require HTTPS for browser authentication cookies. Keep enabled in production.
settings_item_auth_access_token_ttl_secs: How long short-lived site access tokens remain valid.
settings_item_auth_refresh_token_ttl_sec: How long browser sessions can renew access without logging in again.
settings_item_auth_allow_user_registrati: Allow new users to create site accounts after initial setup.
settings_item_auth_register_activation_e: Require email activation before newly registered users can sign in.
settings_item_auth_register_activation_t: How long registration activation links remain valid.
settings_item_auth_contact_change_ttl_se: How long contact-change confirmation links remain valid.
settings_item_auth_password_reset_ttl_se: How long password reset links remain valid.
settings_item_auth_contact_verification_: Minimum interval between contact verification emails.
settings_item_auth_password_reset_reques: Minimum interval between password reset requests.
settings_item_auth_email_code_login_enab: Allow users to sign in with one-time email codes when mail is configured.
settings_item_auth_passkey_login_enabled: Enable passkey login when the passkey flow is available.
settings_item_avatar_dir_desc: Local directory for uploaded user avatar WebP files. Switching to none or Gravatar cleans up the uploaded files for that user.
settings_item_gravatar_base_url_desc: Base URL used when generating Gravatar avatar URLs. You can point this to a mirror.
settings_item_auth_email_code_login_allo: Allow email codes as a fallback for TOTP challenges.
settings_item_auth_email_code_login_ttl_: How long login email codes remain valid.
settings_item_auth_email_code_login_rese: Minimum interval between email login code sends.
settings_item_auth_local_email_allowlist: Allowed local-account email addresses or exact ASCII domains. Empty means unrestricted.
settings_item_auth_local_email_blocklist: Blocked local-account email addresses or exact ASCII domains. Blocklist wins over allowlist.
settings_item_external_auth_enabled_desc: Enable configured OAuth2/OIDC providers for site account login.
settings_item_external_auth_auto_registe: Allow trusted external identities to create local users automatically.
settings_item_cors_enabled_desc: Enable runtime CORS handling for cross-origin browser requests.
settings_item_cors_allowed_origins_desc: Comma-separated origin allowlist for browser integrations.
settings_item_cors_allow_credentials_des: Allow cross-origin browser requests to include credentials.
settings_item_cors_max_age_secs_desc: How long browsers may cache CORS preflight responses.
settings_item_audit_log_retention_days_d: How long audit log records are retained.
settings_item_audit_log_recorded_actions: Action allowlist recorded by the audit system.
settings_item_mail_smtp_host_desc: SMTP server hostname used for account and security emails.
settings_item_mail_smtp_port_desc: SMTP server port used for transactional email delivery.
settings_item_mail_smtp_password_desc: Password or app token for authenticated SMTP delivery.
settings_item_mail_from_address_desc: Email address used as the From address.
settings_item_mail_from_name_desc: Display name used for outgoing account emails.
settings_item_mail_security_desc: Use TLS for SMTP delivery. Port 465 uses implicit TLS; other ports use STARTTLS when enabled.
settings_item_mail_template_register_act: Subject template for registration activation emails.
HTML template for registration activation emails.
settings_item_mail_template_contact_chan: Subject template for contact change confirmation emails.
HTML template for contact change confirmation emails.
settings_item_mail_template_password_res: Subject template for password reset emails.
HTML template for password reset emails.
Subject template sent after a password reset succeeds.
HTML template sent after a password reset succeeds.
settings_item_mail_template_contact_chan: Subject template sent after account contact changes.
HTML template sent after account contact changes.
settings_item_mail_template_external_aut: Subject template for verifying email addresses from external auth.
HTML template for verifying email addresses from external auth.
settings_item_mail_template_login_email_: Subject template for one-time login code messages.
HTML template for one-time login code messages.
settings_item_yggdrasil_server_name_desc: Server name exposed to launchers through authlib-injector metadata.
settings_item_yggdrasil_allow_profile_na: Allow launcher login using Minecraft profile names.
settings_item_yggdrasil_allow_skin_uploa: Allow Minecraft profiles to upload skin textures.
settings_item_yggdrasil_allow_cape_uploa: Allow Minecraft profiles to upload cape textures.
settings_item_yggdrasil_token_ttl_days_d: How long Yggdrasil launcher access tokens remain valid.
settings_item_yggdrasil_max_active_token: Maximum active launcher tokens retained per user.
settings_item_yggdrasil_max_texture_uplo: Maximum uploaded texture file size in bytes, enforced while streaming multipart data.
settings_item_yggdrasil_max_texture_pixe: Maximum texture pixel count checked from the PNG header before full decode.
settings_item_yggdrasil_skin_domains_des: Domain allowlist exposed in authlib-injector metadata for skin and cape URLs.
settings_item_yggdrasil_public_base_url_: Externally reachable base URLs used to build texture URLs.
settings_item_yggdrasil_signature_public: PEM public key exposed in metadata when no signing private key is configured.
settings_item_yggdrasil_signature_privat: PEM RSA private key used to sign Yggdrasil texture properties.
settings_item_mail_outbox_dispatch_inter: Seconds between persistent mail outbox dispatch polls.
settings_item_background_task_dispatch_i: Default interval for background task dispatch loops.
Maximum idle backoff interval for background task dispatch loops.
settings_item_background_task_max_concur: Maximum number of background tasks processed concurrently.
settings_item_background_task_max_attemp: Default maximum attempts for retryable background tasks.
settings_item_task_retention_hours_desc: How long completed background task records and artifacts are retained.
settings_item_task_list_max_limit_desc: Maximum page size accepted by background task list APIs.
settings_item_maintenance_cleanup_interv: Default interval for maintenance cleanup loops.

personalSettings.title: Personal settings
personalSettings.description: Manage your display profile, avatar, and sign-in security options.

sectionDescriptions.profile: Avatar, display name, and account details.
sectionDescriptions.security: Account status and sign-in security entry points.
sectionDescriptions.passkeys: Device credentials and passwordless sign-in methods.

personalSettings.accountDescription: These details appear in the account workbench, admin user list, and future public site surfaces.
personalSettings.avatarDescription: Upload an image and crop it into a WebP avatar.
personalSettings.avatarRemoveHint: Removing the avatar deletes this account's uploaded avatar files. If you use Gravatar, it only stops using that source.
personalSettings.displayNameDescription: Up to 64 characters. Leave it empty to show your username.
personalSettings.avatarCropDescription: Choose the avatar area. The server will store 512 and 1024 pixel variants.
personalSettings.securityDescription: Review active sessions and revoke devices you do not recognize.
personalSettings.externalAuthDescription: External auth identities that can sign in to this account.
personalSettings.externalAuthEmpty: No external auth identities are linked.
personalSettings.passkeysDescription: Sign in with device biometrics or a security key.
personalSettings.passkeysUnsupported: This browser does not support passkeys.
